## [06:02 - 06:39]

Number two, understand that what they are saying to you is basically an RDR. It's a reactionary defense response mechanism. It is nothing more than that. Number three, know what people need so that they can feel at ease. Four, create responses to each one of those things. Five, use quick close and quick objection handlings. All our quick fix modules, use those to assist you in being better prepared. Look, the RDR exists for every person that comes into your home or into your office.
